chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 327 of 2024 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 16.05.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Maitlo, Advocate along with Petitioner Agha Ather Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Inspector Abdul Muniam Larik, SHO PS Dars is present and has filed statement, stating that there are eight criminal cases registered against brother of the petitioner. He further undertakes that he will act in accordance with the law and would not cause any harassment to the petitioner and his family members. The petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
